records.question: Which documents with receipt number 189 and other details exactly x have a status of currently working on and a receipt date on or after 1996-07-27 03:30:40?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN ref_document_status ON documents.document_status_code = ref_document_status.document_status_code
WHERE ref_document_status.document_status_description = 'currently working on' AND documents.receipt_date >= '1996-07-27 03:30:40' AND documents.receipt_number = '189' AND documents.other_details = 'x'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id
FROM Documents
JOIN Ref_Document_Status ON Documents.document_status_code = Ref_Document_Status.document_status_code
WHERE Documents.receipt_number = '189'
AND Documents.other_details = 'x'
AND Ref_Document_Status.document_status_description = 'currently working on'
AND Documents.receipt_date >= '1996-07-27 03:30:40'

records.question: Which documents have receipt number 124 and receipt date 1999-04-17 14:19:32, are currently working on status, have other details as b, were mailed on or before 1971-11-03 12:32:14, and were handled by Fedex with shipping agent description k?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN ref_shipping_agents ON documents.shipping_agent_code = ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_code
JOIN ref_document_status ON documents.document_status_code = ref_document_status.document_status_code
JOIN documents_mailed ON documents.document_id = documents_mailed.document_id
WHERE ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_name = 'Fedex' AND documents.other_details = 'b' AND ref_document_status.document_status_description = 'currently working on' AND documents_mailed.mailing_date <= '1971-11-03 12:32:14' AND documents.receipt_number = '124' AND documents.receipt_date = '1999-04-17 14:19:32' AND ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_description = 'k'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT d.document_id
FROM Documents d
JOIN Documents_Mailed dm ON d.document_id = dm.document_id
JOIN Ref_Shipping_Agents rsa ON d.shipping_agent_code = rsa.shipping_agent_code
WHERE d.receipt_number = '124'
AND d.receipt_date = '1999-04-17 14:19:32'
AND d.other_details = 'b'
AND dm.mailing_date <= '1971-11-03 12:32:14'
AND rsa.shipping_agent_name = 'Fedex'
AND rsa.shipping_agent_description = 'k'

records.question: Which documents with a document_type_description of u were received on or after 1973-11-05 21:48:53?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN ref_document_types ON documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
WHERE documents.receipt_date >= '1973-11-05 21:48:53' AND ref_document_types.document_type_description = 'u'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id
FROM Documents
JOIN Ref_Document_Types ON Documents.document_type_code = Ref_Document_Types.document_type_code
WHERE Ref_Document_Types.document_type_description = 'u' 
AND Documents.receipt_date >= '1973-11-05 21:48:53'

records.question: Which documents have a type description of b, are handled by UPS with a shipping agent description of g, include other details exactly as z, and have draft details exactly as k?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN ref_shipping_agents ON documents.shipping_agent_code = ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_code
JOIN ref_document_types ON documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
JOIN document_drafts ON documents.document_id = document_drafts.document_id
WHERE ref_document_types.document_type_description = 'b' AND ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_description = 'g' AND ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_name = 'UPS' AND documents.other_details = 'z' AND document_drafts.draft_details = 'k'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT d.document_id
FROM Documents d
JOIN Ref_Document_Types dt ON d.document_type_code = dt.document_type_code
JOIN Ref_Shipping_Agents sa ON d.shipping_agent_code = sa.shipping_agent_code
JOIN Document_Drafts dd ON d.document_id = dd.document_id
WHERE dt.document_type_description = 'b'
AND sa.shipping_agent_name = 'UPS'
AND sa.shipping_agent_description = 'g'
AND d.other_details = 'z'
AND dd.draft_details = 'k'

records.question: What documents have a type that is exactly u and were handled by the shipping agent described as g?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN ref_shipping_agents ON documents.shipping_agent_code = ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_code
JOIN ref_document_types ON documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
WHERE ref_document_types.document_type_description = 'u' AND ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_description = 'g'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id
FROM Documents
JOIN Ref_Document_Types ON Documents.document_type_code = Ref_Document_Types.document_type_code
JOIN Ref_Shipping_Agents ON Documents.shipping_agent_code = Ref_Shipping_Agents.shipping_agent_code
WHERE Ref_Document_Types.document_type_code = 'u'
AND Ref_Shipping_Agents.shipping_agent_description = 'g'

records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN ref_shipping_agents ON documents.shipping_agent_code = ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_code
JOIN ref_document_types ON documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
WHERE ref_document_types.document_type_description = 'f' AND ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_description = 'k' AND documents.receipt_date <= '2005-09-30 00:10:02' AND documents.receipt_number = '114' AND documents.other_details = 'j'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id
FROM Documents
WHERE document_type_code = 'f'
AND shipping_agent_code = 'k'
AND receipt_number = '114'
AND other_details = 'j'
AND receipt_date <= '2005-09-30 00:10:02'

records.question: Which documents were handled by the shipping agent USPS and have associated drafts?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN ref_shipping_agents ON documents.shipping_agent_code = ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_code
JOIN ref_document_status ON documents.document_status_code = ref_document_status.document_status_code
JOIN document_drafts ON documents.document_id = document_drafts.document_id
WHERE ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_name = 'USPS'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT d.document_id
FROM Documents d
JOIN Ref_Shipping_Agents rsa ON d.shipping_agent_code = rsa.shipping_agent_code
JOIN Document_Drafts dd ON d.document_id = dd.document_id
WHERE rsa.shipping_agent_name = 'USPS'

records.question: Which documents with receipt number 80 and other details exactly q were mailed using USPS with description q on or after 1973-11-05 21:48:53?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN ref_shipping_agents ON documents.shipping_agent_code = ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_code
JOIN ref_document_status ON documents.document_status_code = ref_document_status.document_status_code
WHERE ref_document_status.document_status_description = 'mailed' AND ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_name = 'USPS' AND ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_description = 'q' AND documents.receipt_number = '80' AND documents.receipt_date >= '1973-11-05 21:48:53' AND documents.other_details = 'q'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT d.document_id
FROM Documents d
JOIN Ref_Shipping_Agents rsa ON d.shipping_agent_code = rsa.shipping_agent_code
JOIN Documents_Mailed dm ON d.document_id = dm.document_id
WHERE d.receipt_number = '80'
AND d.other_details = 'q'
AND rsa.shipping_agent_name = 'USPS'
AND rsa.shipping_agent_description = 'q'
AND dm.mailing_date >= '1973-11-05 21:48:53'
